title: HAMMER: Hamiltonian Curiosity Augmented Large Language Model Reinforcement

algorithms.name: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)
algorithms.description: Extends Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) by sampling groups of responses to estimate group-relative advantages

data_strategies.name: Curriculum Learning (CL)
data_strategies.description: Applied to LLM reinforcement learning, typically using difficulty-based sequencing of Chain-of-Thought (CoT) annotations

issues: Limitations of traditional curriculum learning approaches
results.proposed_solution: Exploring diversity-based methods as an alternative to difficulty-based approaches

challenges: Unstable convergence, particularly in early training stages
